name: MikroTik wAP 60G AP
title: MikroTik wAP 60G AP
short_description: 716 MHz CPU, 4 Core, 256MB RAM, 1x 1000Mbps, 802.11ad, 60GHz, RouterOS L4
description: The MikroTik wAP 60G AP (Part Number: RBwAPG-60ad-A) is a robust and versatile wireless unit, designed to deliver exceptional performance in a wide range of outdoor and indoor settings. Engineered to function as a Base Station, Point-to-Point, or Customer Premises Equipment (CPE), this device is ideal for users seeking reliable, high-speed wireless connectivity. As a part of MikroTik’s advanced 60 GHz lineup, this device is capable of delivering high-speed connectivity with considerable flexibility in its deployment and particularly effective in high-density areas where traditional Wi-Fi frequencies are saturated, as it operates on the less congested 60 GHz spectrum.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Technical Specifications
detailed_description.text: At the core of the wAP 60G AP is a powerful ARM 32bit IPQ-4019 CPU with four cores running at a nominal frequency of 716 MHz. It comes equipped with 256 MB of RAM and 16 MB of FLASH storage, supported by a RouterOS license level 4, which provides advanced networking features and capabilities. The device's mean time between failures (MTBF) is rated at approximately 200,000 hours at 25C, ensuring long-term reliability.

detailed_description.heading: Point-to-Multipoint Scenario
detailed_description.text: This wireless unit excels in connectivity, supporting up to eight simultaneous client connections over distances exceeding 200 meters. This capability makes it an excellent choice for creating dense networks that require reliable and fast wireless communication, such as in busy urban environments or large-scale industrial areas. For, example, wAP 60G AP and wAP 60G allows creating high-speed Point-to-Multipoint setup in 60 GHz frequency that is not affected by the crowded Wi-Fi spectrum. In such scenario, wAP 60G AP (comes with RouterOS L4 license for AP connections and 60 degrees antenna) can be used as Base Station / Access Point. wAP 60G AP supports up to eight simultaneous clients (wAP 60G with L3 license) on distances of 200 m+.

detailed_description.heading: Powering and Network Integration
detailed_description.text: The device offers dual powering options through its DC jack and PoE input, supporting a wide voltage range of 11-57 V. With a maximum power consumption of only 5 watts and passive cooling, the wAP 60G AP operates efficiently and quietly. It includes one Gigabit Ethernet port to facilitate high-speed wired connections and seamless integration into existing network infrastructures.

detailed_description.heading: Installation Flexibility
detailed_description.text: MikroTik has equipped the wAP 60G AP with everything needed for various installation scenarios. The package includes a wall mounting kit, straps for pole mounting, and a table stand for indoor use, offering flexibility regardless of the setting. Additionally, the unit comes with a power supply and a Power over Ethernet (PoE) injector, facilitating easy setup without the need for separate power cables.

detailed_description.heading: Design and Build
detailed_description.text: The wAP 60G AP is housed in a weatherproof enclosure that ensures it can operate under various environmental conditions, from indoor office settings to challenging outdoor environments. Its compact dimensions of 185 x 85 x 30 mm make it unobtrusive, suitable for any location where space is at a premium. The integrated phase array antenna with 60° beamforming capability significantly enhances its performance, making it capable of penetrating some windows depending on the material, thus extending its usability. Its IP55 rating certifies that it is protected against dust ingress and low-pressure water jets, making it suitable for a wide range of operational climates and conditions. In addition, the wAP 60G AP meets stringent international standards, holding certifications from CE, FCC, IC, EAC, and ROHS
